title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Science Homework
questions.text: Students should complete the worksheet on electricity before Thursday. You do not need to answer question 7 unless you want extra practice. We will check questions 1 to 6 in class.
questions.question: What does the notice say?

options.A: One question is optional for students.
options.B: All seven questions must be finished.
options.C: The worksheet will not be checked.

questions.explanation: Question 7 is not required unless students want extra practice.

questions.heading: Message from Leah to Sophie
questions.text: Sophie, I found the scarf you liked, but it’s not in the sale anymore. The assistant says it may be cheaper again next month. Do you want me to leave it for now?
questions.question: What is Leah asking Sophie?

options.A: Whether she still wants the scarf at full price.
options.B: Whether the assistant should reduce the scarf today.
options.C: Whether she has already bought the scarf.

questions.explanation: The scarf is no longer reduced, and Leah asks if Sophie wants to wait.

questions.heading: School Orchestra
questions.text: The orchestra needs students who play violin, flute or drums for the spring concert. You should be able to read simple music. Rehearsals start next Tuesday in the main hall.
questions.question: Who should respond to this poster?

options.A: Students with the right instrument and basic music skills.
options.B: Students who want to learn an instrument from nothing.
options.C: Students who can only rehearse on Thursdays.

questions.explanation: The orchestra needs specific instruments and simple music reading.

questions.heading: From: Mr Green / Subject: Your essay
questions.text: Your essay has some excellent ideas, but the paragraphs are not in a clear order. Before you write the final version, move the paragraph about transport nearer the beginning.
questions.question: What advice does Mr Green give?

options.A: Improve the organisation of the essay.
options.B: Remove all ideas about transport from it.
options.C: Write a longer final paragraph instead.

questions.explanation: He tells the student to change the order of the paragraphs.

questions.heading: Frozen Pasta Meal
questions.text: Cook from frozen for twenty minutes. Do not heat this meal in a plastic container unless it is marked microwave-safe. After cooking, leave it for two minutes before eating.
questions.question: What does the label warn customers?

options.A: Some containers may be unsafe for heating.
options.B: The meal must be unfrozen before cooking.
options.C: The meal should be eaten immediately.

questions.explanation: Only microwave-safe plastic containers should be used.
